bottom_line: The `integration-tests` QV gate (`make allure-integration`) is a silent no-op ŌĆö the Makefile target has no recipe, so every item's integration-tests gate passes in 0s without running anything. Add the recipe or repoint the gate command in skill templates.
coverage_notes: All 10 step logs read in full (largest was S08 at 3086 lines / 349 KB ŌĆö read tail for summary, grep'd for FAILED/ERROR with no hits beyond test-method names like 'test_raises_on_failure'). No log exceeded 1 MB. All 9 step reports in ai-dev/active/CR-00046/reports/ read. Workflow manifest + iw item-status JSON cross-referenced. Cross-checked against CR-00045's reports and self-assess output to confirm the integration-tests finding is systemic, not item-specific. No agent retries or fix cycles existed (item-status shows 0 for both). DB telemetry: full.

findings.title: `integration-tests` QV gate is a silent no-op ŌĆö `make allure-integration` has no Makefile recipe
findings.recommendation: Add an `allure-integration:` recipe to Makefile (mirror the existing `test-integration:` recipe at Makefile:76, adding `--alluredir=tests/output/allure/integration`). Alternative quick fix: change the three skill templates that hardcode `make allure-integration` to use `make test-integration` and re-run `iw sync-skills`.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/CR-00046_S09_run1.log:1 ŌĆö "make: Nothing to be done for 'allure-integration'."
ai-dev/active/CR-00045/reports/CR-00045_S08_QvGate_report.md:16 ŌĆö same "Nothing to be done" on the prior item (systemic, not CR-00046-specific)
Makefile:10 ŌĆö `allure-integration` appears only in `.PHONY` list; no recipe (grep -nE '^allure-' Makefile returns no matches)

skills/iw-workflow/SKILL.md:131, skills/iw-new-feature/SKILL.md:307, skills/iw-new-incident/SKILL.md:454 ŌĆö all three canonical templates hardcode `make allure-integration` as the integration-tests gate command
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-incident `make allure-integration` is a silent no-op (no Makefile recipe) so the integration-tests QV gate passes in 0s without running anything on every Feature/Incident/CR; add the recipe (mirror Makefile:76 with --alluredir=tests/output/allure/integration) or repoint the three skill templates (iw-workflow/iw-new-feature/iw-new-incident) to `make test-integration`. Analyzed in CR-00046 (see ai-dev/work/CR-00046/reports/CR-00046_self_assess_report.md and CR-00045 reproduction). Target file: Makefile. Effort: S.
